_meta.stage: 3 (nested worst-cell design) -- fusion bar ENFORCED as a machine-checkable gate; residual-unmeasurable 'fused' entries reclassified to 'assumed'
_meta.ruling_summary: Conservative crossing by default (taxonomy option c). Fusion (option b) ONLY where there is positive evidence for the conditional structure, never as a convenience. Every cell/dimension-pair carries provenance (observed|fused|assumed). Every fusion assumption is a TESTABLE HYPOTHESIS recorded here with an explicit refutation condition, not a settled fact.

provenance_values.observed: the pair is directly observed jointly in a real open source (taxonomy a) -- use it
provenance_values.fused: the pair is reached by statistical fusion under a stated conditional-independence assumption (taxonomy b) -- allowed ONLY with positive evidence for the conditional structure; a declared fidelity risk, must appear in the fidelity ledger
provenance_values.assumed: no basis to observe or defensibly fuse (taxonomy c) -- crossed by the coverage design and treated as independent-by-necessity; pay the N cost; the honest default

entry_schema.pair: [dimA, dimB] -- the two dimensions whose joint structure this entry concerns
entry_schema.prior_belief: the stage-1 prior about the association (from landscape doc section 4), NOT a measured value
entry_schema.conditional_independence_assumption: if provenance=fused: the exact CI assumption relied on (the shared keys the fusion conditions on); null otherwise
entry_schema.shared_keys: keys the fusion matches on (region, tenure, dwelling_type, income_band, age); null if not fused
entry_schema.refutation_condition: the concrete observation that would REFUTE this entry -- what a real household-level check (shadow-billing volunteer track / counterfactual twin) would have to show to prove the assumption wrong. REQUIRED for every fused/assumed entry.
entry_schema.test_bed: where the refutation test would run (shadow_billing_volunteers | counterfactual_twin | published_crosstab_when_available)
entry_schema.status: hypothesis (scaffold) | evidenced (stage 3 populated from a real cross-tab) | tested (checked against households)
entry_schema.fidelity_ledger_ref: id in the fidelity evidence ledger once a fused entry is committed as a declared risk; null until then

_meta.hard_boundary: No personal microdata. Entries are populated from published aggregates/cross-tabs only. Refutation tests use the shadow-billing VOLUNTEER track (consented) or the counterfactual-twin machinery, never obtained unit records.
_meta.notes: Entries below are seeded from the landscape doc section 4 'prior expectations to test, not assert'. They are HYPOTHESES (status=hypothesis) so stage 3 can attach the real measured association and flip status to evidenced without re-authoring the structure -- this is the 'design so it is cheap later' the ruling asks for. No association value here is measured.
_meta.measurable_fusion_bar: A fusion (provenance=fused) is PERMITTED only if the shared keys explain the pair's association to within a stated tolerance in a source where BOTH keys and target are jointly seen (residual-association test). Where the residual cannot even be measured because the pair is never jointly observed (all D-tech-x-household and E-attitude-x-anything), there is by definition NO positive evidence -> the pair is CROSSED (assumed), never fused. This makes the ruling's 'fusion only with positive evidence' a mechanism, not a judgement call.
_meta.key_finding_aggregate_vs_tail: Aggregate Cramer's V UNDERSTATES tail-concentrated coupling. heating_fuel x region reads V=0.070 (orthogonal) but oil-only ranges 0.12% (London) to 7.83% (Wales), ~65x. Refutation/crossing decisions gate on TAIL lift, not aggregate V, because the coverage objective is the worst cell.

enforced_fusion_gate.status: ENFORCED (stage 3) -- this is the rule the coverage design actually applies, not an exhortation
enforced_fusion_gate.predicate: provenance may be 'fused' IFF residual_measurable==true AND measured_residual_association <= residual_tolerance, evaluated in a source where BOTH the shared keys AND the target are jointly observed. IF residual_measurable==false THEN there is by definition NO positive evidence for the conditional structure -> the gate FORCES provenance='assumed' (cross conservatively, pay the N cost). Directly-observed pairs are provenance='observed' and are not subject to this gate.
enforced_fusion_gate.residual_tolerance_status: CHOSEN (Cramer's V of the within-cell residual association; a second director dial, sibling to the tail-lift threshold)

verdicts.observed_na: pair directly observed jointly -> not a fusion, gate not applicable
verdicts.fuse_permitted: residual measurable AND <= tolerance -> fusion allowed as a DECLARED fidelity risk (must appear in fidelity ledger)
verdicts.cross_forced: residual UNMEASURABLE (pair never jointly observed) -> no positive evidence -> gate forces 'assumed' (cross)

enforced_fusion_gate.why: MAKE_IT_STICK: a rule lives as enforced code or it evaporates. The asymmetric-error ruling (a confident false CI fusion mis-locates the tail and everything downstream learns it as true) is honoured by defaulting to cross whenever the conditional structure cannot be positively evidenced.
enforced_fusion_gate.consequence_this_stage: Four entries previously labelled 'fused' on prior belief (EV_ownership x income, solar_PV x tenure, price_sensitivity x income, channel_preference x age) have residual_measurable==false, so the enforced gate reclassifies them to 'assumed' (crossed). The coverage design already crosses them; only the register labels were optimistic.

open_data_degradation_finding.finding: The 2021 Census DROPPED the heating-fuel x tenure/dwelling cross-tab that 2011 had. 2011 DC4402 published accommodation x central-heating x tenure with FUEL detail; the 2021 open equivalent (RM003) collapses heating to a binary has/has-not, and fuel type (TS046) is published jointly only with GEOGRAPHY and occupancy/age, never with tenure or dwelling type. So the fabric<->fuel joint a supplier most wants is WEAKER in 2021 open data than in 2011 -- a genuine, citable regression: open data getting worse, not better.
citation: ONS Census 2011 table DC4402EW (Accommodation type by central heating by tenure, with fuel detail)
ONS Census 2021 table RM003 (Nomis NM_2103_1) -- heating collapsed to binary
ONS Census 2021 table TS046 (Nomis NM_2064_1) -- fuel type x geography only
open_data_degradation_finding.consequence: the fabric<->fuel joint must be CROSSED (assumed) or fused via region only; it cannot be observed at household level in 2021 open data.

refutation_events.trigger: DESNZ Public Attitudes Tracker Spring 2026 (renter adoption-agency gap 42% vs 7%)
refutation_events.action: assumed(crossed) -> observed(recoupled); first refutation to fire on this register

entries.prior_belief: strong -- owner-occupied stock skews to houses/better fabric; social/private-rented skews to flats/poorer fabric
entries.refutation_condition: EHS/Census published cross-tab of tenure x dwelling-type x SAP band shows Cramer's V < 0.15 (effectively independent) -- would refute the 'strong' prior and mean the design must cross them rather than collapse.

measured_association.tail_cell: Owned: Owns outright | A caravan or other mobile or temporary structure

entries.evidence_note: Census 2021 RM003 accommodation x tenure V=0.273 (MODERATE, not 'strong' as the prior assumed). Not refuted (V>0.15) but weaker than believed -- design must not over-collapse.

fusion_gate.residual_test: n/a -- pair directly observed jointly in an open source
fusion_gate.note: directly observed; not subject to the fusion gate

entries.prior_belief: strong -- off-gas-grid regions (rural Scotland/Wales/SW) force electric/oil/LPG; urban regions gas-dominant
entries.refutation_condition: SUPERSEDED by measurement: the aggregate 'near-uniform' refutation fired (V=0.070<0.15) yet the pair is NOT independent in the tail. New refutation of the TAIL structure = a consented/area check showing oil/electric incidence does NOT vary by region within the off-gas segment.

measured_association.tail_cell: London | District or communal heat networks only

entries.evidence_note: Census 2021 TS046 fuel x region V=0.070 -> ORTHOGONAL IN AGGREGATE, contradicting the 'strong' prior. BUT the off-gas TAIL is strongly regional (oil-only 0.12% London vs 7.83% Wales, ~65x). The prior was wrong about the bulk, right about the tail. Crossing decision: cross the mains-gas bulk, PIN the off-gas tail to region.

fusion_gate.residual_test: n/a -- pair directly observed jointly in an open source
fusion_gate.note: directly observed; not subject to the fusion gate

entries.prior_belief: moderate -- plug-in ownership concentrated in higher income deciles
entries.conditional_independence_assumption: given region and tenure, EV ownership rate depends on income band only (DfT VEH0 regional marginals fused onto income via the income x region key)
entries.refutation_condition: A consented household check where EV ownership within a fixed (region, tenure, income_band) cell varies materially by a dimension NOT in the keys (e.g. household composition / number of drivers) -- would show the CI assumption drops real structure and the fusion mis-locates EVs.
entries.partial_anchor: Census 2021 RM131 tenure x cars V=0.303 (moderate) is the nearest OPEN anchor for car-ownership structure; true income is FRS-gated and EV-at-household is unobservable (DfT VEH0135 is vehicle-count at LSOA only, ~5.2 private plug-ins per 100 households). Fusion remains under the CI assumption; residual UNMEASURABLE -> stays a declared risk.

fusion_gate.residual_test: UNMEASURABLE -- the pair is never jointly observed in any open source, so the residual association cannot be computed; by the enforced predicate this is no positive evidence -> cross
fusion_gate.note: enforced gate FORCES provenance='assumed' (crossed). Refutation/promotion path is the entry's refutation_condition.

entries.gate_reclassification_reason: enforced fusion bar: residual unmeasurable = no positive evidence for the conditional structure = cross conservatively (asymmetric-error ruling)

entries.prior_belief: strong -- PV requires roof control; concentrated in owner-occupiers, near-absent in rented flats
entries.conditional_independence_assumption: given dwelling_type and tenure, PV presence follows regional MCS install density (MCS dashboard postcode-area counts fused onto owner-occupied houses)
entries.refutation_condition: MCS-linked or consented data showing material PV incidence in social/private rented or flats within a region -- would refute the 'roof control gates PV' structure the fusion assumes.

fusion_gate.residual_test: UNMEASURABLE -- the pair is never jointly observed in any open source, so the residual association cannot be computed; by the enforced predicate this is no positive evidence -> cross
fusion_gate.note: enforced gate FORCES provenance='assumed' (crossed). Refutation/promotion path is the entry's refutation_condition.

entries.gate_reclassification_reason: enforced fusion bar: residual unmeasurable = no positive evidence for the conditional structure = cross conservatively (asymmetric-error ruling)

entries.prior_belief: correlated beyond what income+tenure explain -- the landscape doc (section 5) names this as exactly where a naive CI fusion is likely WRONG
entries.refutation_condition: This pair is DELIBERATELY not fused: attitudes are never openly observed jointly with tech (landscape section E gap). It is crossed (assumed independent-by-necessity). Refutation of the crossing = a consented source showing green-stance predicts PV ownership after conditioning on income+tenure, at which point it should be PROMOTED to a fused entry with that structure -- the opposite direction to the others.

fusion_gate.residual_test: measure within-cell residual association of the pair after conditioning on shared_keys, in a source where keys+target are jointly seen; permit fusion iff residual Cramer's V <= 0.10
fusion_gate.note: currently 'assumed'/crossed pending the residual measurement; may be PROMOTED to fused if a consented/published source shows residual within tolerance

entries.supersession_note: The tenure leg of the attitude/adoption crossing is REFUTED by DESNZ Spring-2026 (see the ['tenure','low_carbon_adoption'] entry). green_stance's OWN residual coupling to PV after conditioning on income+tenure remains crossed/assumed pending its own consented residual measurement -- the recoupling is tenure-structural, not a green_stance promotion.

entries.prior_belief: strong -- lower income => higher price sensitivity; proxy elasticities already in churn_price_elasticity.md
entries.conditional_independence_assumption: given income band and tenure, price sensitivity follows the elasticity proxy (no clean open microdata source for price sensitivity -- landscape section E gap)
entries.refutation_condition: Consented behavioural data (switching response to a price change) where within-cell price sensitivity varies strongly by an unfused dimension (e.g. green-stance or prior-supplier trust) -- would show income+tenure under-determine sensitivity.

fusion_gate.residual_test: UNMEASURABLE -- the pair is never jointly observed in any open source, so the residual association cannot be computed; by the enforced predicate this is no positive evidence -> cross
fusion_gate.note: enforced gate FORCES provenance='assumed' (crossed). Refutation/promotion path is the entry's refutation_condition.

entries.gate_reclassification_reason: enforced fusion bar: residual unmeasurable = no positive evidence for the conditional structure = cross conservatively (asymmetric-error ruling)

entries.prior_belief: moderate -- older households skew to phone/post, younger to app/web
entries.conditional_independence_assumption: given age band, channel preference follows PAT/Ofgem coarse-demographic marginals (no joint of channel-pref with fabric/tech exists -- landscape section E gap)
entries.refutation_condition: Consented interaction data where channel preference within an age band varies materially by region/tenure/digital-access -- would show age alone under-determines it.

entries.prior_belief: the high-value tail -- household-level co-ownership is essentially unobservable in open data (landscape section D honest gap); this is where the money and the mortality live
entries.refutation_condition: Per the ruling, the two errors are asymmetric: a false CI fusion here would systematically misrepresent the joint tail and everything downstream would learn it as true. So this triple is CROSSED (assumed), not fused, until positive evidence for the conditional structure exists. Refutation of the crossing = a consented or commercial-panel-derived source establishing real co-ownership conditional structure, at which point it may be promoted to fused with that explicit structure.

fusion_gate.residual_test: measure within-cell residual association of the pair after conditioning on shared_keys, in a source where keys+target are jointly seen; permit fusion iff residual Cramer's V <= 0.10
fusion_gate.note: currently 'assumed'/crossed pending the residual measurement; may be PROMOTED to fused if a consented/published source shows residual within tolerance

measured_association.note: NEAR-CONSTANT: 96%+ of E&W households have central heating; V<=0.06 vs all pairs.

entries.evidence_note: FINDING: 'has central heating' is NOT a real design dimension (near-constant, carries ~no information). Replace with FUEL TYPE, which is openly jointly observed only with REGION (TS046). The fabric x fuel-type joint is a 2021 open-data REGRESSION vs 2011 (RM003 collapses heating to binary).

entries.prior_belief: REFUTED PRIOR: attitudes/adoption were crossed from the structural axes (assumed independent-by-necessity, section E gap). New published evidence shows this crossing is wrong for tenure: dwelling control structurally gates who can even adopt.

measured_association.note_on_v: exact Cramer's V pending the full published cross-tab; the gap/lift below is the sourced, directly-quoted structure (R9 -- lift recorded, V not fabricated)
measured_association.tail_cell: private/social rented x 'heat-pump decision is not mine to make'
measured_association.gap: 42% of renters say a heat-pump install decision 'is not theirs to make' vs 7% of owner-occupiers; Net-Zero/heat-pump knowledge and adoption-likelihood both show 15-20pp tenure/age gaps

entries.evidence_note: DESNZ Public Attitudes Tracker (Heat & Energy Use in the Home), Spring 2026 UK -- official accredited statistics, live fetch 2026-07-21 (docs/market_research/segmentation_joint_structure.md; ASSUMPTIONS.md D-SEGMENT section). This is a STRUCTURAL coupling (control of the dwelling), not merely attitudinal -- a renter's low-carbon adoption is gated by landlord agency regardless of green_stance.
entries.refutation_condition: A published/consented source showing low-carbon adoption agency does NOT vary by tenure after conditioning on income (V<0.15) would refute the recoupling and restore the crossing.
entries.refutation_log: FIRST REFUTED ASSUMPTION on this track (the loop working as designed): the 'adoption independent of tenure beyond roof-control' crossing carried an explicit refutation condition; the DESNZ Spring-2026 tracker fired it. Assumption -> refutation-condition -> new evidence -> reclassification, exactly as the register was built to do. Folded via the D-SEGMENT<->population-coverage reconciliation FRAME (director console 2026-07-21).
entries.knee_note: Recoupling must EARN its place via the re-derived learning-value knee (director 2026-07-21: segments earn their place by measured learning value, not schema completeness). tenure already ranks #2 by learning value (0.22); whether the tenure-gated adoption cell clears the knee is decided by build_learning_frontier.py on the merged schema, not by this entry's existence.
